items.prompt: What did Hector ask about the lab equipment?
items.answer: he wanted to find out whether the microscope was working.

items.prompt: What did Emma want to know about the deadline?
items.answer: she was curious when the final paper would be due.

items.prompt: What did Mariana ask about the new gym hours?
items.answer: she wondered if the gym would open earlier on saturday.

items.prompt: Did you submit the application before the deadline?
items.answer: i have not turned in the application form yet.

items.prompt: Where did Olivia put the spare keys?
items.answer: olivia placed the spare keys inside the small drawer.

items.prompt: Your roommate seemed stressed during the exam week.
items.prompt_task_text: Your roommate seemed stressed during the exam week.
items.answer: he stayed up late finishing his lab reports.

items.prompt: Did you receive the email about the scholarship results?
items.answer: they have not announced the scholarship winners yet.

items.prompt: What did Harold ask about the library renovation?
items.answer: he was wondering when the reading room would reopen.

items.prompt: Professor Cho posted an update on the course website.
items.prompt_task_text: Professor Cho posted an update on the course website.
items.answer: he announced that the midterm has been moved to monday.

items.prompt: Why did Margot prefer the new study room over the old one?
items.answer: she found the new study room far more quiet than the old one.

items.prompt: Where did Julian go this afternoon?
items.answer: julian went to the library to study for his midterm.

items.prompt: When does the new café open near campus?
items.answer: the new café opens at seven in the morning every weekday.

items.prompt: What did Mariana ask about the new study group?
items.answer: she wanted to know if the meetings would be on tuesdays.

items.prompt: Did you finish editing the article for the magazine?
items.answer: i could not finalize the introduction section in time.

items.prompt: Have you seen the announcement from the dean?
items.answer: the dean has not released the official statement yet.

items.prompt: Matthew got the concert tickets refunded yesterday.
items.prompt_task_text: Matthew got the concert tickets refunded yesterday.
items.answer: he confirmed that the tickets had been refunded already.

items.prompt: What did Angelina ask about the new internship?
items.answer: she was curious whether the position was paid or unpaid.

items.prompt: Your laptop battery has been draining quickly this week.
items.prompt_task_text: Your laptop battery has been draining quickly this week.
items.answer: the battery should be replaced before the end of the semester.

items.prompt: What did Alison ask about the orientation session?
items.answer: she wanted to know where the new students would gather.

items.prompt: How did Hector find his new apartment in the city center?
items.answer: hector said the apartment was within walking distance of campus.
